subject: [PATCH v3 06/16] mm: preserve RWP marker across PTE rewrites

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch ensures that the RWP (Read-Only Write-Protection) marker is preserved across PTE rewrites in various kernel paths, including swap, device-exclusive, migration, fork, and mprotect operations. Without this preservation, the RWP tracking could be silently dropped, leading to unexpected behavior when accessing pages marked as read-only. The patch modifies several kernel functions to restore the PAGE_NONE semantics after rewriting a PTE on a VM_UFFD_RWP VMA, thus maintaining the integrity of the RWP marker.
